nodes.name: 穴鴞
nodes.summary: 穴鴞（Burrowing owl，学名 Athene cunicularia），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于北美洲、南美洲，常见栖息地包括稀树草原。

nodes.name: 南美洲
nodes.summary: 南美洲是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联190种鸟类，包括小美洲鸵、大美洲鸵、北山䳍等190种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 北美洲
nodes.summary: 北美洲是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联97种鸟类，包括紅嘴樹鴨、黑嘴天鹅、加拿大雁等97种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: cunicularia }} The burrowing owl (Athene cunicularia) is a small, long-legged, primarily terrestrial—though not flightless—species of owl native to the open landscapes of North and South America

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: cunicularia }} The burrowing owl (Athene cunicularia) is a small, long-legged, primarily terrestrial—though not flightless—species of owl native to the open landscapes of North and South America

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: They are typically found in grasslands, rangelands, agricultural areas, deserts, or any other open, dry area with low vegetation. They nest and roost in burrows, and, despite their common name, do not often construct these dwellings themselves, rather repurposing disused burrows or tunnels previously excavated and inhabited by other species, such as American badgers (Taxidea taxus), foxes (Vulpes sp.), ground squirrels or prairie dogs (Cynomys spp.), among others
